problem_statement: Capture policy and browser observation receipts exist, but future browser, screen, video, audio, sensor, and reality-capture evidence needs a standard digest-only packet before any live capture authority is considered.
success_criteria: TrustedCaptureEvidencePacket validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

TrustedCaptureEvidencePacket binds source-surface hash, capture policy ref, evidence classification ref, browser observation ref, consent ref, UAO ref, LifeMeaningJudgment ref, and digest refs for surface, frame, media, transcript, sensor, and artifact manifest evidence

TrustedCaptureEvidencePacket blocks live capture, media recording, screen recording, microphone capture, camera capture, sensor reads, file writes, connector calls, external writes, raw media storage, raw source-body storage, raw secret storage, publication, terminal closure, and success claims
TrustedCaptureEvidencePacket rejects authority drift, raw media or privacy drift, digest and scope drift, missing evidence refs, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
TrustedCaptureEvidencePacket is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: source surface remains hash-only in the Foundation example
capture policy, evidence classification, browser observation, UAO, and LifeMeaningJudgment refs remain explicit
live capture and media recording remain false
camera, microphone, and sensor reads remain false
